name: PRA Group, Inc.
description: PRA Group, Inc. is a global leader in acquiring and collecting nonperforming loans. Headquartered in Norfolk, Virginia, the company partners with financial institutions to help them resolve their nonperforming loan portfolios while providing customers with tailored repayment solutions. With operations spanning across the Americas, Europe, and Australia, PRA Group leverages data-driven analytics and a commitment to compliance to manage a diverse portfolio of consumer debt. Since its founding in 1996, the company has established itself as a key player in the financial services industry, focusing on integrity and sustainable financial recovery.
